compounds.frequency: 3x per week for 4-6 weeks, then 1x per week for 4 weeks

benefits.description: Recommends SS-31 followed by MOTS-C for mitochondrial function, improved electron transport, insulin sensitivity, athletic performance, and muscular energy

protocol_notes: User recommends SS-31 (4mg 1x/day for 10-30 days) followed by MOTS-C (5mg 3x/week for 4-6 weeks then 1x/week for 4 weeks) for mitochondrial rejuvenation. Also recommends taking Ipamorelin and Tesamorelin together 2x per day for synergistic effect. It is unclear if the user is describing personal use or offering general recommendations.
